909a35aaf1ce.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
909a35aaf1ce.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
909a35aaf1ce.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

00c79e2c669d.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
00c79e2c669d.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
00c79e2c669d.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

4d9977739c4a.title: Build review volume — you lack statistical credibility
4d9977739c4a.description: Only 6 Google reviews. A single bad review moves your average visibly. Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews.

641727210e77.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
641727210e77.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.
